about-us-mission-text: To bridge the gap between global patients and India's leading healthcare facilities, ensuring affordable, high-standard medical outcomes for everyone.
about-us-vision-text: To be the premier global gateway for medical excellence, recognized for empathy, transparency, and seamless patient care.

hero.title: Elite Healthcare. Affordable Outcomes. Global Trust.
hero.description: Navigate India’s leading medical institutions. We provide comprehensive facilitation for international patients, ensuring a seamless journey from initial consultation to post-operative recovery.
hero.subtitle: Your Trusted Medical Facilitation Partner in India

quickLinks.about: Why India is a global leader in healthcare
quickLinks.services: Explore our medical & travel support services

about.subtitle: Why Choose India?
about.title: Global Healthcare Standards at a Fraction of the Cost
about.description: MediHelps connects international patients with India's most prestigious medical institutions. We understand that traveling for health is a major decision; we make it stress-free by managing every clinical and logistical detail of your visit.
about.missionText: Providing transparent, cost-effective, and high-standard medical pathways for international patients.
about.visionText: Setting the benchmark for medical tourism through personalized care and clinical precision.

management.title: Comprehensive Logistics
management.description: From airport transfers to local hospitality and language interpretation, we ensure a comfortable environment for your recovery.

education.title: Recovery Support
education.description: Coordinating post-operative care and rehabilitation to ensure you return home in optimal health.

whyChoose.title: The MediHelps Advantage
whyChoose.description: We combine medical expertise with dedicated hospitality to deliver a seamless healing experience.

expertise.title: Accredited Institutions
expertise.description: We partner exclusively with India’s highest-rated accredited hospitals.

innovation.title: Economic Efficiency
innovation.description: Access elite medical procedures at significantly lower costs than Western alternatives.

support.title: Dedicated Concierge
support.description: A personal care coordinator is assigned to guide you through every step of your medical journey.

services.title: Your Pathway to Wellness
services.description: We offer a complete ecosystem of medical and travel services designed specifically for the unique requirements of foreign patients.

treatments.subtitle: Specialized Clinical Care
treatments.description: Advanced treatments in Cardiology, Oncology, and Orthopedics using the latest precision technology.

international.subtitle: International Patient Services
international.title: Seamless Medical Travel to India
international.description: We handle the administrative complexities so you can focus on healing. Our integrated approach covers everything from medical visas to premium accommodation.
international.contactDesk: Speak with a Global Care Advisor

analytics.title: Medical Record Evaluation
analytics.description: Receive a comprehensive assessment of your medical reports from India's senior specialists before you begin your journey.

management.title: Visa Documentation
management.description: Assistance with medical visa invitations and travel documentation for patients and attendants.

security.title: Priority Scheduling
security.description: Bypass waiting lists with immediate admission and treatment by senior consultants.

metrics.title: Transparent Pricing
metrics.description: All-inclusive medical packages with no hidden costs, covering surgery and hospital stay.

education.title: Companion Support
education.description: Logistical support for family members, including visa assistance and nearby accommodation.

care.title: Continuity of Care
care.description: Structured follow-up protocols and remote monitoring once you return to your home country.

hospitals.title: Leading Medical Facilities
hospitals.description: Our network includes India’s most advanced hospitals, featuring state-of-the-art infrastructure and internationally recognized medical faculties.

apollo.description: A leader in clinical excellence, recognized for pioneering organ transplant and cardiac programs.

fortis.description: Expertise in advanced orthopedics and neurosurgery with a focus on minimally invasive techniques.

max.description: A center for excellence in oncology and complex surgical interventions using robotic technology.

ambani.description: Specialized in high-end diagnostics and complex pediatric care with a focus on clinical research.

artemis.description: A premier institution providing personalized care and dedicated wings for international patients.

manipal.description: An integrated facility offering a broad spectrum of specialty treatments and preventive care.

contact.title: Begin Your Recovery
contact.subtitle: Share your medical reports for a comprehensive assessment and a cost estimate within 24 hours.

form.subheader: Our coordinators will provide a response shortly
form.name: Full Name
form.successMessage: Thank you, {name}. A medical coordinator will contact you shortly.
form.errorMessage: Submission failed. Please reach out via WhatsApp or Email.
